name: claude-agent-bridge
description: MCP bridge for using local Claude CLI as a bounded reviewer and analysis delegate for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate bounded review and analysis to local Claude CLI.
interface.longDescription: A local MCP bridge that lets Codex delegate bounded review, log analysis, and second-opinion tasks to Claude CLI with redaction, timeouts, and saved outputs.
defaultPrompt: Ask Claude for a bounded review of this diff.
Use Claude as a second reviewer for this failure analysis.
